news.title: A new index at the factory gate: Why India's PPI matters beyond inflation

news.title: Why has India cut broken grain share in PDS rice under Rice Milling Transformation scheme?

news.why_it_matters: Changes in PDS norms directly affect food quality for beneficiaries, impact rice millers, and influence national food grain management and food security.

news.title: India's rising solar penetration is causing power grid stress: EAC-PM paper
news.india_relevance: A report from the Prime Minister's Economic Advisory Council highlights a critical challenge for India's renewable energy goals.
news.why_it_matters: Underscores the urgent need for grid modernization and scalable energy storage solutions to support India's ambitious clean energy transition without compromising reliability.

news.title: AI has taken over the stock market. The bond market is next

news.why_it_matters: Explores the transformative impact of AI on financial trading, analysis, and investment strategies, signaling major shifts for all market participants, including those in India.

news.india_relevance: As a major global hub for IT services and AI development, India's tech sector will be significantly impacted by strategic shifts in global enterprise AI adoption.

news.why_it_matters: China's advancements in semiconductors have global supply chain and geopolitical implications, directly influencing India's strategic autonomy and industrial policy goals in chip manufacturing.

news.title: 'Smartphone PLI plan exceeds targets, value addition quadruples': Industry informs govt
